hc1ed8ccag12ebg4c44ga4c6g414a6fa2aef3: You're a True Soul. You can't die. Please stay with us.
h1c6b23d1g9724g4bb0gae9cg82a9f831f96b: I don't think he's conscious. Can you hear us, Ed?
h091746a4g177eg4fffgbaddgd5300b9b695d: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
hce67ce02g7dfeg441bg8621gbe71b33fdda5: I don't take orders from cowering children.
hb7287cfag78d2g4a2fg8a23gd5d760f42728: Stay quiet, keeping a careful eye on them.
h938d0724gead0g4949g94f7gbe2b4c2c69c6: Whatever evil has beset you, I can't bash it from over here!
h3d5966c7g8eedg47bagaed5g6a7f3402a5a2: He might be a healer, Bry.
hbcefb021gcd29g4f4dg9391g12c57796ae0b: She might be a healer, Bry.
h8dd11318g0953g4e95g9221gc8a4d30a865a: *The injured man locks eyes with you. A familiar squirming churns in your head.*
he44cd7ccg9da0g4170g96f5g1324d38071bf: *Useless. Your minds intertwine. You see his siblings - Andrick and Brynna. New recruits. Yours to shepherd.*
hb0228abbg438cg429eg94a9g1587fb101ef9: He is a True Soul. Mind him. He will - he - he...
hc99e0fd7ga9a1g4951g9d92gba7c9b6fa10e: She is a True Soul. Mind her. She will - she - she...
h495c8ee3g5b9fg4032g8758g3fca819ec50d: You're... you're a True Soul. Edowin, our brother - he was chosen. Like you.
h22bdf736g52a3g4d98g8f97g1715cccfb3a5: Do you have orders for us? We were reporting to Edowin.
h58d6f0a2g9d0bg4684g9f16gef300e02af89: You're mistaken - I'm no True Soul.
h1458844bg223fg4cf3g8018g7e79002cd004: What are you doing?! Your sword, brother. Now.
h677eae04g15a7g4e8egaf01g5011a6cdb7de: What...? Are you... are you testing us?
h87f7f49egd50bg4168gab35gdab0d7f07983: A True Soul - like you - has been chosen by the Absolute. You speak with Her voice.
hcc639939g7795g46a1ga61dg550b5b342bcd: Your words are Her command. She grants you the power to enforce her will.
h30c0647dge150g469fg8ea2gdb38c6419a9a: And when the time comes, the True Souls - you - will rule.
h81a78017g2e22g407dgac6bg0a1a8ebeaf29: Bah. I will serve at no ruler's side but my Queen's.
hfd93f547g06b5g483cg89bag187d75cf79e5: A crude summary. You have more to learn of our faith, novice.
h6de9a94cg40aeg45dfg9d26g36cdbc67cb37: I'm sorry, True Soul. I... only repeated what I thought I knew.
h8b8a716eg6d42g4c43g8b96gadf3f9236fd3: It seems the Absolute still has a great deal to teach me.
h9e799516ga9e1g490aga188g968f3569b514: Please. Any supposed new god would have an uphill battle.
h71fcf9dfg369cg4808gbdbbge21a1f4e9569: Huh. Ruler of a new order, eh? Could get a lot done from the top.
h8ceb6a60g8580g4100g8122gd3e41b4d3e1d: That fellow was infected, like us. Must be a True Soul hallmark.
h6a92f57ag920ag4463gbcfag465022a3fd8f: That fellow had a tadpole in his head, and they consider him blessed? Chosen? What madness is this?
hb2f90ee6g13ffg4d87g8483g5b05e55d8266: Oh I like these two. All zeal and no brains.
h6f0fa7fbg0709g4729g8887gea68d6bf5706: The Absolute is our goddess. She's going to rip down the old world order, start a new one.
h762c7d4cg2a5dg4d4fga0aegb1350c936fa5: Then we'll be the ones with the power - well, you will firstly, True Soul. You don't need me to explain that.
h2a839769ga61bg483cgb4cfg4e246fe8819c: Perhaps you can help me. I'm looking for the druid Halsin.
hb2527253gf40fg4c9bg9966ga36f5416d5f0: Why are you out here? The wilderness is dangerous.
he51f811bg9b94g49c0g9f64g4be65ba525d4: We know that all too well, sir. But... the Absolute sent us here.
h42873d80g4037g49b2g8b24gd18cda01081f: We know that all too well, ma'am. But... the Absolute sent us here.
hf2371600g89a8g42c3gb66fg22e938b878a7: We're looking for fugitives. Survivors from that ship that crashed farther west of here.
h1505bca0g5bf4g4e3cg9467g669dd19364ee: We don't know what they look like, but anyone who survived that crash is bound to be injured. That's enough to get us started.
hba0796e7g8938g4bb6g8273g509b84de593c: The Absolute wants them found. At any cost.
h4f836ed9gcb98g470bg8cc3ge16eba9ee7da: I'm a survivor of that crash. Looks like you found me.
h2e7560f8g63d5g45c8gaf22gb1e2b2b41883: What happened to your brother exactly?
hd0d3f119g4066g4fb4g800dgad5476e3133b: An owlbear. It had him on the ground before we had a chance to react.
hbb810be3gefc4g4531gaf14g766020c292a5: We managed to drag him away, but the beast's claws had already done their work.
h803671d8gec0ag42e5gb588gc196aea4f814: I told Edowin not to look in that cave - it was filthy with owlbear tracks.
h51e48fe1gb705g41a8ga308g64bd112a71c3: We were looking for fugitives. Survivors from that ship that crashed farther west of here.
he4dfa114g7285g4818g93f9gb70f0fcc90a4: ... but instead of them, Edowin found an owlbear. An angry one.
hf2d6740ag04bcg4ae1g99bag8ff2d44494d8: You need to find the beast and avenge your brother.
heee4c863g287cg4d10g9043gbd5bbe8907ee: It killed one of us. It killed Edowin. It's an enemy of the Absolute.
h41f9f6e6g2332g473cgbf51g779c6b46d429: You're right, sir. The beast must be destroyed.
h1e274018g2557g4c68g94c8gcbda95a166ee: You're right, madam. The beast must be destroyed. With you by our side, we'll deal with it as it ought to be dealt with.
h8699f841g470cg478fgae48gc601758044f5: The cave is just ahead. It was too much for us before, but... but if you could help us, True Soul... we may stand a chance.
h66674209gbd91g4f10ga830g075a60fa8e1d: The Absolute? They follow the same god as that wretched goblin, Sazza.
hb5662c92gdf82g414agb8cfg01d105a467a8: The Absolute - that's the mystery god Sazza mentioned. Eerie common ground if you ask me.
hcdf2cdcfg4db8g4f47g9874ge1b9c2a4426e: |They spoke of the Absolute - same as that goblin, Sazza. Curious. |

h90a9e47eg3b1ag4a83g8375gf06a7c9dbb31: |They spoke of the Absolute - same as that goblin, Sazza. Curious. |
h166e1b7dgce4eg4912ga385g5155db0f94ea: They spoke of the Absolute, same as that captive goblin. They must be part of the same sect.
h4408fba2gf1dcg4d33ga28ega37eb8bf00d1: The Absolute, eh? Same name that goblin Sazza mentioned.
h3fc295e0g18c3g4a99ga7a1g7e3f38fc484d: They spoke of the Absolute - same as that goblin, Sazza. Curious.
hee7055bage9e7g44fbg8ae6g8bbb039b9147: A religion. Or a cult. All influenced by their Absolute.
h09595e9agb7f3g416cg9062gadbcbc843896: Looks like the Absolute's drawing all sorts to become followers. Impressive, in a way.
hbbc53448g228cg40e8gb8b1ge2cf41633efa: |Seems as though the Absolute's attracting followers from all kinds of places.|
hde2a7559ge53bg403eg8874g7d2122845ed8: |Seems as though the Absolute's attracting followers from all kinds of places.|
hcaf344e9g01b6g4dbfg8cfdg12a5be395712: |Seems as though the Absolute's attracting followers from all kinds of places.|
h0800d52cg720fg48bbgb57bg123a4bf7a9fd: A cult, from the looks of it. And word's spreading fast.
hc3bbe41cgcf1dg44b8g8b76g5afc139844fa: Goblins and humans worshipping the same god? Eerie common ground if you ask me.
h9f38af5cgfd77g47bag91dcg85bb0d902fac: Seems like a popular little deity, whoever they are.
hcd6d831bgc35eg4facgb577gfac265e27b14: True Souls? Absolute? They sounded deranged.
h03661499g9c67g42ffgae2cg607bcbb9ac46: Well. That quite the load of gobbledygook, wasn't it?
heea6c3f1g5bb1g4b1ag9a15g88173abe91c9: |True Soul? Absolute? What were they raving on about?|
ha413e341gede2g465ag903dg06272d223019: |True Soul? Absolute? What were they raving on about?|
ha093d70dg9cafg46a9gb4f2ga5d27ca82e93: Absolute? True Soul? Mad ravings, surely.
h7f5eb17cg3a60g408bgaeaagbcb2e478561d: |True Soul? Absolute? What were they raving on about?|
hd410f187g99cag46d4g9848g77dd27bee1d7: True Soul? Absolute...? I didn't follow half of what they said.
h0d2f83d9g539bg4b24g9edbgddda1997cf47: Absolute, True Soul - what's all that about?
he36c662eg24ceg4f32gb56bg0295452710ef: True Soul? Absolute? What were they raving on about?
he6c2f783ga7b1g4814gbe5fg4aa5b3d2238f: A religion. Or a cult. All influenced by their Absolute.
hc3e05e72gff0ag4ed6g9b11gbbefad9d2612: They're clearly devoted to the Absolute. Whatever that is.
h4159290bg37c0g4fa1g82e0gff9f59cd10c9: |Whatever it is, the Absolute has a powerful hold over them.|
h999562eeg3a05g498dg8477gca77af668929: |Whatever it is, the Absolute has a powerful hold over them.|
hfe8bc24ag9c5bg477fg86a6gebabccc9b5c2: |Whatever it is, the Absolute has a powerful hold over them.|
h1810c6bcg7c92g4b09g9cb2gdf677711b90e: Sounds like a cult. And the Absolute is bending their ears.
hcb076cd0gd5e5g4f53g9fd5ge8e29955c2fc: Whatever the Absolute is, it certainly seems to command a lot of devotion.
h92db789dg8049g489cg91efg5ef7082cb45a: They're devoted to this Absolute. Whatever it is.
hb75877c0g7e2ag475cg863bg5d47ddb1ec08: The beast is dead. You should be on your way.
h0470d8a2gab60g4670ga43egc087c3d71064: May the Absolute continue to guide your hand, sir. As for us, we won't take any more of your time.
h188c70aagb2d5g4d43g87a6g47df348bd629: May the Absolute continue to guide your hand, madam. As for us, we won't take any more of your time.
hd12ac6dcg076eg4334g9c82ga11799b2fb8f: I killed an owlbear nearby. If that's what attacked your brother, consider him avenged.
hb1f3f4f7g1855g4684gaf3dgd8d257214850: Forget the owlbear. You're still alive - so go.
he5fcaa7age868g4c0eg9d85g83b30c797143: I suppose... I suppose he'd want us to go on - find a way to honour his sacrifice.
h3c081a67gba56g459egb65bgdf24d91a0e5b: Forget the owlbear. You're still alive - so go.
h90e7cf5cgd0d5g427fgb8b0g23708b6162b6: You should get out of here.
h7cffd53fg262bg4b47g9fb4g0e602d182127: Wait! Please - don't leave us. What should we do now...?
h33ee7a32gda83g41c4gb6dcg21ce2b399d2d: A True Soul. Thank the Absolute. Edowin, our brother - he was chosen. Like you.
h9fe42bddg6574g4ce3g8bd1ga4f639bb9ba2: Mind the True Soul. He will - he - he...
ha84a037ege9ffg48a9gac4ag2535a92f7eee: Mind the True Soul. She will - she - she...
hf73877b2gf01dg4cbeg98adg71a7e87a8b39: *Your minds intertwine. You see his siblings - Andrick and Brynna. New recruits. Yours to shepherd.*
h6bafd7bdg4015g4970gb015gbc86ae60703e: *Your limbs do not obey. Your minds intertwine. You see his siblings - Andrick and Brynna. New recruits. Yours to shepherd.*
h975719d0ged3cg4471g9be6g57da38311863: An owlbear. Please, do you have any -
h8651aaa9g79a7g41aega501g96f1eaaf8043: Shut up, Andrick! Do you serve the Absolute?
h34a2303dgf709g4be2gbea6g20de602f3e9c: He's wounded. I'd like to help - if you'll let me.
h61edb063g9dbbg4091gaaa2g96fd03852bc0: He's hurt badly. An owlbear got him deep. If there's anything you can do...
h400d0426ge43eg41c4g9c67g2098c5789951: His wounds look deep. I might be able to help.
haa7be14ega838g4f6dgb7a8g9c50c90f29ef: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
h3f7d0478g2005g477agab3dg09c28abd5f2a: Don't you recognise a True Soul when you see one?
hc3a1abbagbf80g4314g83ebg8cf815f41dbc: I'm so, so sorry. It's our brother - True Soul Edowin. He's injured, and I... I wasn't thinking.
ha4d7fd91g7304g41fcg8f3fg2aad2ce5bace: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h518c57c4g1abeg4bfagad49gdddd90013aba: *The injured man locks eyes with you. The parasite writhes in your head.*
h90505216g417cg415dgb3b4ge4f1a1bb4c4f: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
hb10d8880gf976g41fdg8b58g2aba4fc80ef5: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
h9a147932gddf3g4b1fg8e3bg3d9c5e02589c: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
h95860c02gfbb3g444bgb72agb50bd8cf07b2: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
hde24d29eg186dg4d87g8721g7f2f31ccfe2a: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
h1015c3d7gabd7g4209ga068g54e8fbab4a3f: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
hee709676gb5d5g457dgaeddgdaedc32f95c9: I will go where I wish.
hd9e90986g29fcg4467g888dg4d9bca25bb6c: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
